insights.headline: Sunday 3am is the cleanest hour of the UK week, 28% below average.
insights.detail: Schedule grid-powered plant operations into the lowest-carbon windows.

insights.headline: Imported sawn/planed timber up +7.6% YoY, the biggest mover in the UK construction basket.
insights.detail: Sand & gravel (incl. aggregate levy) is the next biggest mover at +7.3% YoY.

insights.headline: Switching Phenolic Foam Board to Cellulose Insulation cuts ~95% kgCO₂e/kg.
insights.detail: Use the calculator to model the swap against your spec and benchmark it against LETI and RIBA 2030 targets.
